steps.title: Define the curator's goal
steps.content: The journalist claims Enwezor did not focus only on modern African artists. Instead, he showed how their work belongs in the larger context of global modern art and art history.

steps.title: Look for global context
steps.content: A focuses on a retrospective of one African artist. C connects African art to African independence movements, not global modern art. D surveys African photographers within one medium. The answer is B.
